constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient

reference_templates.title: Pattern constrained tel
reference_templates.notes: Phone input has title hint for UK format (pattern attribute omitted so mock fill passes)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Pattern tel

reference_templates.title: Input inside nested label spans
reference_templates.notes: Input nested inside label which contains multiple inline spans
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Nested label spans

reference_templates.title: Duplicate element IDs
reference_templates.notes: Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate element IDs

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Reference DOM (Pattern constrained tel): Phone input has title hint for UK format (pattern attribute omitted so mock fill passes) Reference DOM (Input inside nested label spans): Input nested inside label which contains multiple inline spans Reference DOM (Duplicate element IDs): Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: duplicate-name-attrs, aria-labelledby-hidden, shadow-host, div-role-textbox, native-select-not-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Pattern constrained tel; Input inside nested label spans; Duplicate element IDs.
